findings: Deliverable form is ambiguous — ticket describes what floors accomplish but not what they are as artifacts
Scope absorbed from originally separate deliverable; three consumers collapsed to two floors without addressing whether overnight agents and morning review need different things
Requirements alignment cites handoff readiness (input completeness) but floors are about output survivability — orthogonal concerns
Dependency radius overstated — 4-6 skills affected, not all skills
applied_fixes: Revised intent clarity from High to Low — deliverable form is genuinely ambiguous
Revised requirements alignment reasoning to cite morning-is-strategic-review and surface-all-failures instead of handoff readiness
Narrowed complexity/criticality reasoning to 4-6 affected skills; maintained complex/high ratings
